obstacle_groups.label: Top-left corner — x=0..2, y=0..2, touches top and left edges
Top-right corner — x=12..14, y=0..2, touches top and right edges
Left pillar A — x=0..2, y=5..9, touches left edge
Right pillar A — x=12..14, y=5..9, touches right edge
Left pillar B — x=0..2, y=12..16, touches left edge
Right pillar B — x=12..14, y=12..16, touches right edge
Bottom-left corner — x=0..2, y=18..19, touches bottom and left edges
Bottom-right corner — x=12..14, y=18..19, touches bottom and right edges
Central top bar — x=5..9, y=5; first obstacle in laser path
